channel.title: Ryan Mack
channel.description: Writing about software, technology, and whatever else is worth putting into words.

item.title: The Quiet Work
item.description: The software industry has produced some of the most celebrated fortunes in history. The people who built its foundations are mostly unknown. That gap is worth sitting with.

item.title: Maine's Data Center Moratorium and the Case for Smaller AI
item.description: Maine just passed the first US moratorium on large data centers. Some will read that as a blow to AI. I think it might be the opposite.

item.title: Beyond the Prompt
item.description: The fear about AI in software engineering is that it replaces engineers. The more immediate risk runs in the opposite direction.
